modelManagementDesc: Choose a Whisper speech recognition model that fits your needs. Larger models offer better accuracy but require more time and memory.
recommendedForYou: Recommended for your device ({{memory}} GB RAM): {{model}}

categoryDesc.tiny: Fastest processing speed. Suitable for quick previews or when accuracy is not critical.
categoryDesc.base: Fast processing with improved accuracy. Good for everyday use.
categoryDesc.small: Best balance of speed and accuracy. Recommended for most users.
categoryDesc.medium: High-accuracy transcription for professional use. Slower processing.
categoryDesc.largeTurbo: Near-best accuracy with significantly faster speed. Best value among large models.
categoryDesc.large: Highest accuracy models for demanding quality requirements. Slowest processing.

quantizedTip: Quantized models are smaller and faster with slightly reduced accuracy. Ideal for limited disk/memory.
recommendedBasisWithGpu: Based on {{memory}}GB RAM · GPU acceleration available

tierDesc.fast: Speed first — great for a quick try
tierDesc.balanced: Recommended for daily use, accuracy and speed in balance
tierDesc.accurate: Accuracy first, requires a powerful computer

noInstalledModels: No models installed yet — turn off the filter to browse all models

modelDesc.base: More accurate than tiny, still fast
modelDesc.small: Entry-level balance of speed and accuracy
modelDesc.large-v3-turbo: Near top accuracy at a decent speed
